info.name: LivePosts – Socket.IO CRUD
info.description:
Socket.IO events for the LivePosts real-time CRUD API.

**Server:** http://localhost:3000

Each request represents a Socket.IO event.
- Set the connection URL to `http://localhost:3000`
- Use the event name shown in each request
- Paste the example body as the message data

response.name: posts – example response
postCreated – example response

request.description:
**Emit event:** `updatePost`
**Payload:**
```json
{
  "postId": "<MongoDB _id>",
  "title": "Updated Title",
  "content": "Updated content goes here."
}
```

**Listen for:** `postUpdated` (broadcast to all clients)
**Response:**
```json
{
  "message": "post updated successfully",
  "postId": "...",
  "title": "Updated Title",
  "content": "Updated content goes here."
}
```

response.name: postUpdated – example response

request.description:
**Emit event:** `deletePost`
**Payload:** `"<MongoDB _id>"` *(plain string, the post _id)*

**Listen for:** `postDeleted` (broadcast to all clients)
**Response:**
```json
{
  "message": "post deleted successfully",
  "postId": "..."
}
```

**Emit event:** `searchPosts`
**Payload:** `"<search term>"` *(plain string)*

Searches both `title` and `content` fields (case-insensitive regex).

**Listen for:** `searchResults` (only sent back to the requesting socket)
**Response:**
```json
[
  { "_id": "...", "title": "Hello World", "content": "..." }
]
```

response.name: searchResults – example response
